---
title: "Optimization, Part II"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
execute:
  echo: false
  fig-width: 6
  fig-asp: 0.6
  out-width: "90%"
---



## Overview

In this, we will introduce more methods for optimization, focusing on constrained optimization through linear and quadratic programming.

```{r, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

```

::: {.panel-tabset .panel-pills}

### Slide Deck: Introduction to Linear Programming

[![](./slides/topic_optimization_II/preview_lp.png){width=70%}](./slides/topic_optimization_II/s_lp.pdf)

**Linear Programming**  
[Download slides (PDF)](./slides/topic_optimization_II/s_lp.pdf)


***

### Slide Deck: Quadratic Programming

[![](./slides/topic_optimization_II/preview_qp.png){width=70%}](./slides/topic_optimization_II/s_qp.pdf)

**Quadratic Programming**  
[Download slides (PDF)](./slides/topic_optimization_II/s_qp.pdf)


***

:::
